message:
fix: convert absolute /dp/ paths to relative in Cargo.toml

Replace 46 hardcoded /dp/ absolute paths with relative ../ paths so the
project can be built on any machine with sibling repos at the expected
relative locations. This unblocks CI/CD and cross-machine builds.

Closes #32

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
